THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANFORD, MARYANN L'HEUREUX, MONIQUE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 437 25TH AVE. UNIT #4 S.F. $6,548.00 RENT, $6,922.50 ATTORNEY FEES, $212.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,682.50, LEASE FORFEITED, PLUS DAMAGES AT $83.30 PER DAY FROM 12/6/99 UNTIL POSSESSION IS RESTORED. PLAINTIFFS ARE FURTHER AWARDED REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES AS DETERMINED BY MOTION AND COSTS OF SUIT.
